title: 宣戦！？いっちょセンター！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon gathers all her fans for a mini
performance and an important announcement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She declares her intent to win every dirt race she
enters, including the end-of-year Tokyo
Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her proclamation to become the undisputed
champion of the dirt gets everyone talking, but
her friend Eishin Flash points out that the plan
seems out of character.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we can find out what that really means,
our schedule becomes swamped with interviews
for Smart Falcon.
